case_notes.notes: Regular check-in. Student appears to be managing but showing early signs of disengagement. Monitoring closely and checking in weekly. Encouraged to use check-in card.
Student self-referred to discuss friendship difficulties. Provided social skills strategies. Will observe in unstructured times and check in again next week.
Wellbeing check-in. Student reported feeling overwhelmed and anxious about upcoming assessments. Discussed breathing techniques and time management strategies. Will follow up next week.
Incident report: Student became distressed during group work and left the classroom. Spoke with student after — they shared they are struggling at home. Referred to school counsellor.
Follow-up meeting with parent/guardian. Family aware of school concerns. Parent noted similar behaviours at home. Collaborative support plan being drafted. Counsellor to lead.

Incident report: Student became distressed during group work and left the classroom. Spoke with student after — they shared they are struggling at home. Referred to school counsellor.

Regular check-in. Student appears to be managing but showing early signs of disengagement. Monitoring closely and checking in weekly. Encouraged to use check-in card.
Student self-referred to discuss friendship difficulties. Provided social skills strategies. Will observe in unstructured times and check in again next week.
